sentences.target: Ich interessiere mich nicht besonders für Religion.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ɪntɛʁɛˈziːʁə mɪç nɪçt bəˈzɔndɐs fyːɐ̯ ʁeliɡiˈoːn/

translations.de: Ich interessiere mich nicht besonders für Religion.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ɪntɛʁɛˈziːʁə mɪç nɪçt bəˈzɔndɐs fyːɐ̯ ʁeliɡiˈoːn/
translations.en: I'm not particularly interested in religion.
translations.es: No me interesa mucho la religión.
translations.fr: La religion ne m’intéresse pas particulièrement.
translations.it: Non mi interessa particolarmente la religione.
translations.pt: Não me interesso muito por religião.
translations.vi: Tôi không quan tâm lắm đến tôn giáo.
translations.nl: Ik ben niet zo geïnteresseerd in religie.
translations.hi: मुझे धर्म में खास दिलचस्पी नहीं है.
translations.el: Η θρησκεία δεν με ενδιαφέρει ιδιαίτερα.
translations.nb: Jeg er ikke særlig interessert i religion.
translations.id: Saya tidak terlalu tertarik pada agama.
translations.sv: Jag är inte särskilt intresserad av religion.
translations.ro: Religia nu mă interesează prea mult.
translations.da: Jeg er ikke særlig interesseret i religion.
translations.ja: 宗教にはあまり興味がありません。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present indicative; part of the reflexive construction 'sich interessieren (für)'.
Reflexive personal pronoun, accusative singular; required object of 'sich interessieren'.
Negation particle; negates the clause.
Manner/degree adverb; modifies the predicate to indicate degree.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the prepositional object.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'für' (accusative).

sentences.target: Sie unterrichtet Religion in der achten Klasse.
sentences.reading: /ziː ʊntɐˈʁɪçtət ʁeliɡiˈoːn ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈaxtn̩ ˈklasə/

translations.de: Sie unterrichtet Religion in der achten Klasse.
translations.ipa: /ziː ʊntɐˈʁɪçtət ʁeliɡiˈoːn ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈaxtn̩ ˈklasə/
translations.en: She teaches religion in the eighth grade.
translations.es: Ella enseña religión en octavo grado.
translations.fr: Elle enseigne la religion en huitième année.
translations.it: Lei insegna religione in terza media.
translations.ru: Она преподаёт религию в восьмом классе.
translations.pt: Ela dá aula de religião no oitavo ano.
translations.vi: Cô ấy dạy môn tôn giáo ở lớp tám.
translations.ar: هي تُدرّس الدين في الصف الثامن.
translations.nl: Ze geeft godsdienst in de achtste klas.
translations.uk: Вона викладає релігію у восьмому класі.
translations.hi: वह आठवीं कक्षा में धर्म पढ़ाती है.
translations.pl: Ona uczy religii w ósmej klasie.
translations.nb: Hun underviser i religion på åttende trinn.
translations.id: Dia mengajar agama di kelas delapan.
translations.sv: Hon undervisar i religion i årskurs åtta.
translations.ro: Ea predă religie la clasa a opta.
translations.da: Hun underviser i religion i ottende klasse.
translations.ja: 彼女は中学二年生に宗教を教えています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present indicative.
Direct object (accusative) of 'unterrichtet'.
Preposition; here used with dative to indicate location.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner of 'Klasse'.
Ordinal adjective; agrees with 'Klasse' (feminine dative singular).
Noun, feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'in'.

sentences.target: Wir sprechen zu Hause selten über Religion.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃpʁɛçən tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə ˈzɛltən ˈyːbɐ ʁeliɡiˈoːn/

translations.de: Wir sprechen zu Hause selten über Religion.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃpʁɛçən tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə ˈzɛltən ˈyːbɐ ʁeliɡiˈoːn/
translations.en: We rarely talk about religion at home.
translations.es: En casa rara vez hablamos de religión.
translations.fr: À la maison on parle rarement de religion.
translations.it: A casa parliamo raramente di religione.
translations.ko: 집에서는 종교에 대해 거의 얘기하지 않아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在家很少谈论宗教。
translations.yue: 我哋喺屋企好少講宗教。
translations.ru: Дома мы редко говорим о религии.
translations.pt: Em casa quase não falamos sobre religião.
translations.he: בבית אנחנו כמעט לא מדברים על דת.
translations.vi: Ở nhà chúng tôi ít khi nói về tôn giáo.
translations.ar: في البيت نادرًا ما نتحدث عن الدين.
translations.nl: Thuis praten we zelden over religie.
translations.uk: Вдома ми рідко говоримо про релігію.
translations.hi: घर पर हम धर्म के बारे में बहुत कम बात करते हैं.
translations.pl: W domu rzadko rozmawiamy o religii.
translations.el: Στο σπίτι σπάνια μιλάμε για τη θρησκεία.
translations.nb: Hjemme snakker vi sjelden om religion.
translations.id: Di rumah kami jarang membicarakan agama.
translations.sv: Hemma pratar vi sällan om religion.
translations.cs: Doma se o náboženství bavíme jen zřídka.
translations.da: Hjemme taler vi sjældent om religion.
translations.ja: 家では宗教の話はほとんどしません。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite verb, 1st person plural present indicative.
Preposition; forms a fixed locative PP 'zu Hause' with dative.
Noun in dative singular (fixed expression); complement of 'zu' in 'zu Hause'.
Frequency adverb; modifies the verb phrase.
Preposition; here with accusative to indicate topic.
Object of the preposition 'über' (accusative).

translations.fr: Ma famille n’a pas de religion.
translations.it: La mia famiglia non ha una religione.
translations.ru: Моя семья не исповедует никакой религии.
translations.vi: Gia đình tôi không theo tôn giáo nào.
translations.uk: Моя родина не сповідує жодної релігії.
translations.hi: मेरे परिवार का कोई धर्म नहीं है.
translations.pl: Moja rodzina nie ma żadnej religii.
translations.el: Η οικογένειά μου δεν έχει θρησκεία.
translations.ro: Familia mea nu are nicio religie.
translations.ja: 私の家族には宗教がありません。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine nominative singular; modifies 'Familie'.
Noun, feminine nominative singular; subject.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present indicative.
Negative determiner, feminine accusative singular; modifies 'Religion'.
Direct object (accusative) of 'hat'.
